data.body: Implementation complete + validated. Full suite 2789 passed/0 failed. Live three-pass review validated against real Claude on ticket 6c5c (6 grounded advisory findings + Pass-4 coaching). Subagent code review done; applied fixes: (1) claim gate fail-CLOSED on unverifiable material fingerprint, (2) P8 window from configured model not hardcoded 1M, (3) advisory-cap blocking-leak assertion. Added plan_review_verdict.schema.json + OUTPUT_SCHEMAS['review_plan'] for parity with completion_verdict (MCP stays NO_SCHEMA_EXEMPT). Next: lint, commit, per-child closure, enable config.
